dc_description: A street-level view of a stone building facade with rectangular block masonry. An arched wooden doorway with frosted glass panels is partially open, revealing a dark interior. A touring bicycle with bags and gear attached is parked against the wall near the entrance, beside a blue cylindrical trash bin and a vertical drainpipe. A small wall plaque to the left of the doorway reads "ISTITUTO DIVINO AMORE." The sidewalk and shallow entrance steps are visible in the foreground.
novel_visual_observations: The bicycle appears equipped for travel, with rear panniers, a handlebar/front roll, water bottles, and bundled gear strapped over the rear rack.
The doorway has a semicircular fanlight divided by wooden spokes, and the right-hand door leaf is swung inward.
rich_context: Santa Maria del Divino Amore, Corso Cavour, Le Mosse, Le Coste, Montefiascone, Viterbo, Lazio, 01027, Italia
